title: Small Weapons
description: Makes the sword and axe smaller for better visibility
body:
🔧 Small Weapons Pack This resource pack combines the best of all my mini-sized weapons textures—Small Swords, Small Pickaxes, and Small Axes—into one clean, lightweight bundle. Perfect for PvP or anyone who prefers a less cluttered screen, each tool is carefully downsized to give you more visibility without losing that vanilla Minecraft feel.

✅ Features:

✔️ Smaller axe and sword models for every tier (wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite)

✔️ Compact sword , pickaxe and axe textures for all materials

✔️ Faithful to the vanilla Minecraft art style

✔️ Ideal for PvP, survival, or aesthetic gameplay

📦 Compatibility:

Minecraft Java Edition

No mods required
